mainEntity.name: The Boss Says the Forklift Crash Was My Fault. Is He Right?
mainEntity.text: The Boss Says the Forklift Crash Was My Fault. Is He Right?

acceptedAnswer.text: Can I get fired for a forklift accident? It’s a huge fear, but workers' comp is a no-fault system in Utah and Idaho. Even if you made a mistake, you are likely still covered for medical bills and lost wages. Don't let a "safety violation" talk scare you out of your rights. If you're feeling pressured to stay quiet, call a lawyer to protect your job.
